mapper.select: SELECT o.id AS orderId, o.order_number AS orderNumber, o.payment_status AS paymentStatus, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_phone AS customerPhone FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.order_number = #{orderNumber} And oi.partner_id = '15f283a9-fd6c-47ba-862d-0af9697a3e1b'

SELECT oi.id AS orderItemId, oi.product_id AS productId, p.code AS productCode, oi.quantity AS quantity FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} And oi.partner_id = '15f283a9-fd6c-47ba-862d-0af9697a3e1b' ORDER BY oi.created_at ASC
